HOW TO BUY

STEP 01

CREATE WALLET

Download Phantom or Solflare. Keep your seed phrase hidden like a secret classified document!

STEP 02

GET SOME SOL

Buy SOL from an exchange and send it to your wallet. You'll need it for the gas and the gains!

STEP 03

GO TO PUMPFUN

Connect your wallet to Pump.fun or Raydium and paste our official mint address.

STEP 04

SWAP FOR $TPT

Trade your SOL for $TPT. Prepare for entry into the Topia. Diamond hands only!
